stemHtml: The autopilot consists of a number of control channels and their basic function is to provide automatic control of the aeroplane…

options.a: During phases of flight with high workload, to improve the mental capacity of the pilot(s).
options.b: About the lateral, vertical and longitudinal axes, and to control the thrust of the engines.
options.c: About the three axes in pitch, roll and yaw.
options.d: During all phases of flight at all times.
